title: Earthy Pancake with Crunchy Topping
description: A simple pancake recipe with a crunchy topping, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flour, mashed rice, and pancake mix.
Add 1 cup of water to the bowl and mix until smooth.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix together the chopped nuts or seeds and a pinch of salt.
Sprinkle the crunchy topping over the pancakes.
